body_txt: Some things are Obviously Evil . This index is for those things that aren't. Be they cute , innocent-looking animals , small children , or just have good publicity , evil in the world often hides under an array of disguises and facades. This is a list of these various nondescript places where evil beings often lurk. These tropes are the opposite of Index with a Heart of Gold and Quirky Good . Closely related to Evil All Along and Subverted Innocence . See also Evil Only by Association , where tropes that aren't evil by definition are normally associated with villains anyway because they have Obviously Evil qualities.
